replacements.changeText: 文字大小

replacements.changeText: 调整对话文字大小

replacements.changeText: ⌘ + Enter 提交

replacements.originalText: When enabled, Ctrl + Enter submits chat and Enter inserts a newline
replacements.changeText: 启用后，Ctrl + Enter 提交聊天，Enter 换行

replacements.originalText: When enabled, ⌘ + Enter submits chat and Enter inserts a newline
replacements.changeText: 启用后，⌘ + Enter 提交聊天，Enter 换行

replacements.changeText: 最大标签页数

replacements.changeText: 消息排队

replacements.changeText: 调整智能体运行时发送消息的默认行为

replacements.changeText: 用量摘要

replacements.changeText: 智能体自动补全

replacements.changeText: 向智能体输入时提供上下文建议

replacements.originalText: Auto-Clear Chat
replacements.changeText: 自动清除聊天

replacements.originalText: After periods of inactivity, open the Chat Pane to a new chat
replacements.changeText: 长时间无操作后，打开聊天面板为新对话

replacements.changeText: 滚动到新消息

replacements.originalText: Scroll Chat to incoming message
replacements.changeText: 聊天自动滚动到收到的消息

replacements.originalText: Completion Sound
replacements.changeText: 完成提示音

replacements.originalText: Play a sound when Agent finishes responding
replacements.changeText: 智能体完成回复时播放提示音

replacements.originalText: Custom Modes
replacements.changeText: 自定义模式

replacements.originalText: Create custom modes with specific models, tools, keybindings, and instructions tailored to your workflow
replacements.changeText: 根据工作流创建包含特定模型、工具、快捷键和指令的自定义模式

replacements.originalText: Auto-Run
replacements.changeText: 自动运行

replacements.originalText: Auto-Run Mode
replacements.changeText: 自动运行模式

replacements.originalText: Run Mode
replacements.changeText: 运行模式

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to run tools like command execution and file writes without asking for confirmation
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体无需确认即可运行命令执行和文件写入等工具

replacements.originalText: Choose how Agents run tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes.
replacements.changeText: 选择智能体运行命令执行、MCP 和文件写入等工具的方式。

replacements.originalText: Auto-Approve Mode Transitions
replacements.changeText: 自动批准模式切换

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to switch modes without asking for confirmation
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体无需确认即可切换模式

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to switch modes without asking first, such as Agent to Plan or Agent to Debug. When off, Cursor asks before switching.
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体无需确认切换模式（如智能体→计划、智能体→调试）。关闭时，切换前会询问。

replacements.originalText: Subagents
replacements.changeText: 子智能体

replacements.originalText: Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel.
replacements.changeText: 为复杂任务创建专用智能体。子智能体可被主智能体调用，并行处理专项工作。

replacements.originalText: Learn about Subagents
replacements.changeText: 了解子智能体

replacements.originalText: Explore subagent model
replacements.changeText: Explore 子智能体模型

replacements.originalText: The Explore subagent is used to do initial research for the main agent
replacements.changeText: Explore 子智能体用于为主智能体做初步调研

replacements.originalText: Agent Review
replacements.changeText: 智能体审查

replacements.originalText: Start Agent Review on Commit
replacements.changeText: 提交时启动智能体审查

replacements.originalText: Automatically review your changes for issues after each commit
replacements.changeText: 每次提交后自动审查更改中的问题

replacements.originalText: Include Submodules in Agent Review
replacements.changeText: 审查包含子模块

replacements.originalText: Include changes from Git submodules in the review
replacements.changeText: 在审查中包含 Git 子模块的更改

replacements.originalText: Include Untracked Files in Agent Review
replacements.changeText: 审查包含未跟踪文件

replacements.originalText: Include untracked files (new files not yet added to Git) in the review
replacements.changeText: 包含未跟踪文件（尚未加入 Git 的新文件）

replacements.originalText: Choose between quick or more thorough, higher-cost analysis
replacements.changeText: 在快速与更深入、成本更高的分析之间选择

replacements.originalText: Context
replacements.changeText: 上下文

replacements.originalText: Include Full-Folder Context
replacements.changeText: 包含整个文件夹上下文

replacements.originalText: Allow full contents of the selected folder to be included in the context
replacements.changeText: 允许将所选文件夹的全部内容包含在上下文中

replacements.originalText: Include Project Structure
replacements.changeText: 包含项目结构

replacements.originalText: Include a simplified directory tree as context
replacements.changeText: 将简化的目录树作为上下文包含

replacements.originalText: Web Search Tool
replacements.changeText: 网页搜索工具

replacements.originalText: Enable Web Search
replacements.changeText: 启用网页搜索

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to search the web for relevant information
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体在网页上搜索相关信息

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to search the web for current information
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体搜索网页获取最新信息

replacements.originalText: Auto-Accept Web Search
replacements.changeText: 自动接受网页搜索

replacements.originalText: Skip approval dialog and immediately search the web
replacements.changeText: 跳过确认对话框并立即搜索网页

replacements.originalText: Skip approval dialog; Agent may run web searches automatically
replacements.changeText: 跳过确认对话框；智能体可自动执行网页搜索

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to fetch content from URLs
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体从 URL 获取内容

replacements.originalText: Web Fetch Tool
replacements.changeText: 网页抓取工具

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to fetch and read web page content from URLs
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体从 URL 抓取并读取网页内容

replacements.originalText: Auto-Approved: Web Search
replacements.changeText: 自动批准：网页搜索

replacements.originalText: Automatically approve web searches the agent initiates
replacements.changeText: 自动批准智能体发起的网页搜索

replacements.originalText: Browser Automation
replacements.changeText: 浏览器自动化

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to interact with browser for frontend testing and web automation
replacements.changeText: 允许智能体通过浏览器进行前端测试和网页自动化

replacements.originalText: Command Allowlist
replacements.changeText: 命令允许列表

replacements.originalText: Allowlist options
replacements.changeText: 允许列表选项

replacements.originalText: You can configure Shell, MCP and Fetch allowlists for Auto mode. However, Auto works well without these.
replacements.changeText: 可为自动模式配置 Shell、MCP 和 Fetch 允许列表。不过，自动模式在不配置这些的情况下也能良好运行。

replacements.originalText: Command Denylist
replacements.changeText: 命令拒绝列表

replacements.originalText: MCP Allowlist
replacements.changeText: MCP 允许列表

replacements.originalText: Fetch Domain Allowlist
replacements.changeText: 抓取域名允许列表

replacements.originalText: Domains that Agent can fetch from automatically. Use '*' for all domains, '*.example.com' for wildcard subdomains.
replacements.changeText: 智能体可自动抓取的域名。使用 '*' 表示全部域名，'*.example.com' 表示通配符子域。

replacements.originalText: Add domains...
replacements.changeText: 添加域名…

replacements.originalText: MCP Tool Protection
replacements.changeText: MCP 工具保护

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from automatically running MCP tools
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动运行 MCP 工具

replacements.originalText: Browser Protection
replacements.changeText: 浏览器保护

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from automatically running browser tools
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动运行浏览器工具

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from automatically running Browser tools
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动运行 Browser 工具

replacements.originalText: File-Deletion Protection
replacements.changeText: 文件删除保护

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from deleting files automatically
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动删除文件

replacements.originalText: Dotfile Protection
replacements.changeText: 点文件保护

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from modifying dot files like .gitignore automatically
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动修改 .gitignore 等点文件

replacements.originalText: External-File Protection
replacements.changeText: 外部文件保护

replacements.originalText: External File Protection
replacements.changeText: 外部文件保护

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from modifying files outside of the workspace
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体修改工作区外的文件

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from creating or modifying files outside of the workspace automatically.
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动在工作区外创建或修改文件。

replacements.originalText: Prevent Agent from creating or modifying files outside of the workspace automatically
replacements.changeText: 阻止智能体自动在工作区外创建或修改文件

replacements.originalText: (controlled by admin)
replacements.changeText: （由管理员控制）

replacements.originalText: Hierarchical Cursor Ignore
replacements.changeText: 分层 Cursor 忽略

replacements.originalText: Apply .cursorignore files to all subdirectories. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.
replacements.changeText: 将 .cursorignore 文件应用于所有子目录。更改此设置需要重启 Cursor。

replacements.originalText: Ignore Symlinks in Cursor Ignore Search
replacements.changeText: Cursor 忽略搜索中忽略符号链接

replacements.originalText: ⚠️ Use with caution. Skip symlinks during .cursorignore file discovery. Only enable if your repository has many symlinks and all .cursorignore files are reachable without them. Changing this setting will require a restart of Cursor.
replacements.changeText: ⚠️ 请谨慎使用。在 .cursorignore 文件发现过程中跳过符号链接。仅当仓库有大量符号链接且无需符号链接即可访问所有 .cursorignore 文件时启用。更改此设置需要重启 Cursor。

replacements.originalText: Approvals & Execution for commands, MCP and more
replacements.changeText: 命令、MCP 等的审批与执行

replacements.originalText: Agent will ask for approval before running tools.
replacements.changeText: 智能体运行工具前会请求批准。

replacements.originalText: Commands that are allowlisted will run automatically.
replacements.changeText: 允许列表中的命令将自动运行。

replacements.originalText: Many commands will run automatically inside the sandbox, and you can also allowlist other actions.
replacements.changeText: 许多命令将在沙箱内自动运行，你也可以将其他操作加入允许列表。

replacements.originalText: A classifier will run for each action and decide whether it's safe to execute this command. Allowlists are still respected.
replacements.changeText: 分类器将评估每个操作是否可安全执行。允许列表仍然生效。

replacements.originalText: Many commands will run automatically inside the sandbox, and a classifier will run for the actions that cannot run in the sandbox. Allowlists are still respected.
replacements.changeText: 许多命令将在沙箱内自动运行；无法沙箱化的操作由分类器评估。允许列表仍然生效。

replacements.originalText: All commands will run without approval, classification or sandboxing.
replacements.changeText: 所有命令将不经批准、分类或沙箱直接运行。

replacements.originalText: Commands that can run automatically
replacements.changeText: 可自动运行的命令

replacements.originalText: Add commands...
replacements.changeText: 添加命令…

replacements.originalText: Add Suggestions
replacements.changeText: 添加建议

replacements.originalText: MCP tools that can run automatically. Format: 'server:tool', 'server:*' for all tools from a server, '*:tool' for a tool from any server, or *:* for all tools from all servers
replacements.changeText: 可自动运行的 MCP 工具。格式：'server:tool'、'server:*'（某服务器全部工具）、'*:tool'（任意服务器的某工具）或 *:*（全部工具）。

replacements.originalText: Add MCP tools...
replacements.changeText: 添加 MCP 工具…

replacements.originalText: Backspace Removes Context
replacements.changeText: 退格键移除上下文

replacements.originalText: Remove the last context pill in the composer when pressing backspace at the start of the input
replacements.changeText: 在输入开头按退格键时，移除 Composer 中的最后一个上下文标签

replacements.originalText: Applying Changes
replacements.changeText: 应用更改

replacements.originalText: Out-of-Context Edits in Manual Mode
replacements.changeText: 手动模式下的上下文外编辑

replacements.originalText: Allow Agent to edit files outside of the selected context in Manual Mode
replacements.changeText: 在手动模式下允许智能体编辑所选上下文之外的文件

replacements.originalText: Auto-Fix Lints
replacements.changeText: 自动修复 Lint

replacements.originalText: Automatically fix lint errors in the chat
replacements.changeText: 在聊天中自动修复 lint 错误

replacements.originalText: Auto-Accept on Commit
replacements.changeText: 提交时自动接受

replacements.originalText: Automatically accept all changes when files are committed and no longer in the worktree
replacements.changeText: 当文件已提交且不再在工作区时，自动接受所有更改

replacements.originalText: Inline Diffs
replacements.changeText: 内联差异

replacements.originalText: Show inline diff decorations in the editor instead of only showing changes in the review panel
replacements.changeText: 在编辑器中显示内联差异装饰，而非仅在审查面板中显示更改

replacements.originalText: Jump to Next Diff on Accept
replacements.changeText: 接受后跳转到下一处差异

replacements.originalText: Automatically jump to the next diff when accepting changes with Ctrl+Y
replacements.changeText: 使用 Ctrl+Y 接受更改时自动跳转到下一处差异

replacements.originalText: Automatically jump to the next diff when accepting changes with ⌘+Y
replacements.changeText: 使用 ⌘+Y 接受更改时自动跳转到下一处差异

replacements.originalText: Auto Format on Agent Finish
replacements.changeText: 智能体完成后自动格式化

replacements.originalText: Automatically format files when the agent finishes
replacements.changeText: 智能体完成时自动格式化文件

replacements.originalText: Inline Editing & Terminal
replacements.changeText: 内联编辑与终端

replacements.originalText: Legacy Terminal Tool
replacements.changeText: 旧版终端工具

replacements.originalText: Use the legacy terminal tool in agent mode, for use on systems with unsupported shell configurations
replacements.changeText: 在智能体模式下使用旧版终端工具，适用于 shell 配置不受支持的系统

replacements.originalText: Toolbar on Selection
replacements.changeText: 选中时显示工具栏

replacements.originalText: Show Add to Chat & Quick Edit buttons when selecting code
replacements.changeText: 选中代码时显示「添加到聊天」和「快速编辑」按钮

replacements.originalText: Auto-Parse Links
replacements.changeText: 自动解析链接

replacements.originalText: Automatically parse links when pasted into Quick Edit (Ctrl+K) input
replacements.changeText: 粘贴到快速编辑 (Ctrl+K) 输入框时自动解析链接

replacements.originalText: Automatically parse links when pasted into Quick Edit (⌘+K) input
replacements.changeText: 粘贴到快速编辑 (⌘+K) 输入框时自动解析链接

replacements.originalText: Themed Diff Backgrounds
replacements.changeText: 主题化差异背景

replacements.originalText: Terminal Hint
replacements.changeText: 终端提示

replacements.originalText: Show a hint for Ctrl+K in the Terminal
replacements.changeText: 在终端显示 Ctrl+K 提示

replacements.originalText: Show a hint for ⌘+K in the Terminal
replacements.changeText: 在终端显示 ⌘+K 提示

replacements.originalText: Use a preview box instead of streaming responses directly into the shell
replacements.changeText: 使用预览框，而非将响应直接流式输出到 shell

replacements.originalText: Preview Box for Terminal Ctrl+K
replacements.changeText: 终端 Ctrl+K 预览框

replacements.originalText: Preview Box for Terminal ⌘+K
replacements.changeText: 终端 ⌘+K 预览框

replacements.originalText: Voice Mode
replacements.changeText: 语音模式

replacements.originalText: Submit Keywords
replacements.changeText: 提交关键词

replacements.originalText: Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored.
replacements.changeText: 语音模式下触发自动提交的自定义关键词。仅允许单个词（不含空格），忽略标点与大小写。

replacements.originalText: Include partially accepted diffs
replacements.changeText: 包含部分接受的差异

replacements.originalText: Use themed background colors for inline code diffs
replacements.changeText: 为内联代码差异使用主题背景色

replacements.originalText: Use preview box instead of inline responses in chat
replacements.changeText: 在聊天中使用预览框而非内联响应
